args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity confirmed as high. Session-fixation flaw in token refresh path affecting auth-api and session-store.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
The patch window for CVE-2026-30117 (session-fixation vulnerability) is confirmed. The following services will be patched:

- auth-api: v5.8.1 → v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.6 → v2.2.9

Deployment will proceed immediately.

args.text: Credential rotation completed: refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed as rejected per rotation-checklist.md.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: Following tonight's security maintenance to address CVE-2026-30117, all staff must sign in again to establish new sessions. Your authentication credentials have been rotated as part of the remediation process. Please log out and log back in to continue working.
